discount_partners.name: Mermaid Hair
discount_partners.desc: A modern hair tools brand offering professional-grade wavers, curlers and styling accessories that help you create salon-worthy looks at home.

discount_partners.name: White Glow
discount_partners.desc: Teeth-whitening and oral-care brand focused on delivering a brighter, healthier smile through simple at-home treatments.

discount_partners.name: White Fox Boutique
discount_partners.desc: Bold, trend-forward online fashion brand delivering on-trend drops, fresh loungewear and occasion-ready pieces.

discount_partners.name: Rent My Dress
discount_partners.desc: Designer dress rentals — perfect for weddings, birthdays, formals and girls' nights out. Over 350 designer pieces.

discount_partners.name: The Booby Co
discount_partners.desc: Innovative fashion solutions designed to support, shape and smooth — wear what you want with total confidence.

discount_partners.name: Princess Polly
discount_partners.desc: Go-to online fashion boutique offering on-trend clothing, accessories and essentials for everyday style.

discount_partners.name: Alya Skin
discount_partners.desc: High-performance, clean formulations inspired by Australian botanicals. Iconic pink clay mask + visible-results skincare.

discount_partners.name: MAC Cosmetics
discount_partners.desc: Globally loved beauty brand known for high-performance makeup, professional-grade formulas and iconic shades.

discount_partners.desc: Beauty brand known for high-performance haircare and skincare inspired by tropical ingredients.

discount_partners.desc: Contemporary furniture and homewares — stylish, comfortable pieces designed to elevate everyday living.

discount_partners.name: Cotton On

discount_partners.name: Skinteq

discount_partners.name: POC Beauty

discount_partners.name: Hello Molly

charity_partners.name: Breast Cancer Network Australia
charity_partners.tagline: Empowering Australians affected by breast cancer.
charity_partners.description: Breast Cancer Network Australia (BCNA) is Australia's peak consumer organisation working to ensure that people affected by breast cancer receive the best possible care, information and support tailored to their needs. BCNA advocates for better treatment, connects individuals and families to trusted resources, and represents the voices of those affected to strengthen the healthcare system.

charity_partners.name: OzChild
charity_partners.tagline: Stronger families. Safer children. Brighter futures.
charity_partners.description: OzChild works to ensure vulnerable children, young people and families receive the care, protection and support they need to stay safe and thrive. Through foster care, family strengthening and early intervention programs, OzChild helps create stable homes and brighter futures for children across Australia.

charity_partners.name: FOUR PAWS
charity_partners.tagline: Revealing suffering, rescuing animals, protecting futures.
charity_partners.description: FOUR PAWS Australia is a registered charity working for a world where animals under human influence are treated with respect and compassion. Through campaigns, rescues and advocacy, FOUR PAWS reveals animal suffering, helps animals in need and drives long-term change in animal welfare both in Australia and internationally.

steps.title: Unlock Access

steps.title: Big Wins, Automatically
steps.desc: Every member is automatically entered into our major giveaways. Getaways, designer bags — the giveaways that feel surreal when you win them.

steps.title: Enjoy Our Regular Giveaways

steps.title: Activate Your Partner Discounts
steps.desc: Member-only savings up to 30% off with brands you already shop, spanning beauty, fashion, wellness, and lifestyle.

steps.title: RSVP To Member Events
steps.desc: Members-only events designed to bring the community together. Pilates mornings, cocktail nights, and curated experiences hosted every month.
